overview: CareBridge is a community-based health monitoring platform that connects volunteers, doctors, and administrators to track patient health in rural communities. Volunteers record patient vitals, doctors review records and provide advice, and alerts are automatically generated when readings fall outside safe ranges.
features: Role-based access for doctors, volunteers, and admins
Patient registration with auto-generated patient codes
Vitals entry with live color-coded health status preview
Automatic health alerts for critical readings (high BP, low SpO2, etc.)
Doctor review panel with advice and mark-reviewed workflow
Dashboard with stats, active alerts, and workflow timeline
Patient detail modal with full health record history
Active alerts tracker with resolve capability
